violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee put on single use gloves without hand wash to restock bulk scones into freezer. *Redirected immediately.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Bagged bagels stored below paper towels at West hand sink-dripped on with every hand wash.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Server sani spray found at 0ppm chlorine solution. -Kitchen Sani Spray found at 200ppm chlorine solution.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -5 coffee powder scoops stored with handles in product.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Using burlap sacks as cupboard covers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Pitted counter at espresso station. -Small under counter fridge has cracked/damaged interior. Worn shelf -Lower dairy board shelves and counter back splash at East hand sink are stained/damaged at caulking. -Lower shelves at back kitchen prep counter are worn.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Splatter, residue, and lime scale at interior surfaces of ice machine.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Debris/strainer in West hand sink basin.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -East hand sink out of soap upon arrival. *Notified staff, restocked immediately.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Cream cheese stored above "cold line" at top of 2 door make table. Found products with temperatures of 44-53. (Items below cold line found at 39F.) -Milk at undercounter refrigerator at espresso station found at 45F.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Both Sani spray bottles found at 200ppm Chlorine solution. -Wiping cloth at West counter visibly soiled.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Multiple coffee powder scoops laying with handles in product.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Soup is thawed in sink of cold water from 5:30 am to 7 am (then placed into soup warmer). *Items should be thawed under refrigeration, under cold running water or as part of the cooking process.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Pitted counter at espresso station. -Small under counter fridge has cracked/damaged interior. -Lower shelves throughout kitchen are worn, due for repaint or reseal.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Filter basket for coffee maker in hand sink upon arrival. *Corrected on-site. Removed immediately.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Personal food items stored in side by side refrigerator, commingling with food service items.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
